features.description: Dependencies added, error variants created, module stubs declared

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub mod backup' src/lib.rs && grep -c 'pub mod manifest' src/lib.rs && grep -c 'pub mod table_filter' src/lib.rs && grep -c 'BackupError' src/error.rs
layers.fail_message: Module declarations or error variants missing from lib.rs/error.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding dependencies and stubs

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Existing tests broken by new dependencies or stubs

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Foundation task - no runtime behavior, only compilation and existing tests

features.description: Manifest types with serde serialize/deserialize roundtrip

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub struct BackupManifest' src/manifest.rs && grep -c 'pub struct TableManifest' src/manifest.rs && grep -c 'pub struct PartInfo' src/manifest.rs
layers.fail_message: Manifest structs not defined in src/manifest.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test manifest 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Data structure definition - tested via unit tests, no separate runtime behavior

alternative_verification.command: cargo test manifest 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: Table filter with glob pattern matching

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub struct TableFilter' src/table_filter.rs && grep -c 'fn matches' src/table_filter.rs
layers.fail_message: TableFilter struct or matches method not found

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test table_filter 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure logic module - tested via unit tests, no separate runtime

alternative_verification.command: cargo test table_filter 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: ChClient extended with FREEZE, UNFREEZE, table listing, mutations, attach, DDL methods

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn freeze_table' src/clickhouse/client.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn unfreeze_table' src/clickhouse/client.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn list_tables' src/clickhouse/client.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn attach_part' src/clickhouse/client.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test clickhouse 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: ChClient methods require real ClickHouse - tested via compilation and unit tests for SQL formatting

alternative_verification.command: cargo test clickhouse 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: S3Client extended with put, get, list, delete, head operations

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn put_object' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn get_object' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn list_objects' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn delete_objects' src/storage/s3.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test storage 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: S3Client methods require real S3 - tested via compilation and unit tests for key formatting

alternative_verification.command: cargo test storage 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: backup::create produces valid BackupManifest with FREEZE/shadow walk/hardlink/CRC64/UNFREEZE

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn create' src/backup/mod.rs && grep -c 'pub fn compute_crc64' src/backup/checksum.rs && grep -c 'struct FreezeGuard' src/backup/freeze.rs
layers.fail_message: Backup module missing key functions or structs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test backup 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Requires real ClickHouse with filesystem access for FREEZE. Integration tests run in Docker per design 1.4.

alternative_verification.command: cargo test backup 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: upload::upload compresses parts and uploads to S3 with manifest last

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn upload' src/upload/mod.rs && grep -c 'compress_part\|fn compress' src/upload/stream.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test upload 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Requires real S3 for upload. Integration tests run in Docker.

alternative_verification.command: cargo test upload 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: download::download fetches from S3 and decompresses parts to local dir

layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn download' src/download/mod.rs && grep -c 'decompress_part\|fn decompress' src/download/stream.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

features.description: restore::restore creates tables and attaches parts with correct sort order and chown

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn restore' src/restore/mod.rs && grep -c 'sort_parts_by_min_block\|fn sort_parts' src/restore/sort.rs && grep -c 'fn attach_parts\|pub async fn attach' src/restore/attach.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test restore 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1
layers.fail_message: Restore unit tests failed (sort, parse part name)

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Requires real ClickHouse with filesystem access. Integration tests run in Docker.

alternative_verification.command: cargo test restore 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: list command scans local backup dirs and remote S3 prefixes

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn list' src/list.rs && grep -c 'fn list_local\|pub fn list_local\|pub async fn list_local' src/list.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test list 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: delete command removes local dirs and remote S3 objects

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn delete\|pub fn delete_local' src/list.rs

layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test delete 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

features.description: All Phase 1 commands wired in main.rs and binary builds successfully

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'backup::create' src/main.rs && grep -c 'upload::upload' src/main.rs && grep -c 'restore::restore' src/main.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo build 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test 2>&1 | grep -E '^test result:' | tail -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.command: ./target/debug/chbackup create --help 2>&1 | grep -c 'Create a local backup'
layers.fail_message: Binary does not respond to --help correctly

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/backup/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/upload/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/download/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/restore/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/clickhouse/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/storage/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: echo N/A - documentation only

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/upload src/download src/restore src/clickhouse src/storage; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || exit 1; done && echo VALID

alternative_verification.command: ls src/backup/CLAUDE.md src/upload/CLAUDE.md src/download/CLAUDE.md src/restore/CLAUDE.md src/clickhouse/CLAUDE.md src/storage/CLAUDE.md 2>&1 | wc -l
